question: Based on the chart of rainfall (mm) over a recent two‑week period, which statement about rainfall at the beginning versus the end of the period is most accurate?

options.A: Rainfall was greater during the final days of the period than during the initial days.
options.B: Rainfall was greater during the initial days of the period than during the final days.
options.C: Rainfall was roughly the same at the beginning and at the end of the period.
options.D: There was no rainfall on several days at both the beginning and the end of the period.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
